title: Know Your Customer (KYC) & Anti-Money Laundering (AML) Policy
subtitle: Satsai Finlease Pvt. Ltd.
approvalNote: (This policy was reviewed and approved by the Board of Directors in the Board Meeting held on April 21, 2025.)

preamble.title: 1. Preamble
preamble.content: Satsai Finlease Private Limited ("SFPL" / "the Company"), being a Base Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC) registered with the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) under Registration No. B-14.01646, engaged in the business of Payday Loans, EMI-based Loans, Loan Against Property (LAP) and other business loans, recognizes its responsibility to prevent misuse of its financial services for money laundering, terrorist financing and other unlawful activities.
preamble.complianceIntro: Accordingly, this Know Your Customer (KYC) and Anti-Money Laundering (AML) Policy is formulated in compliance with:
complianceItems: RBI Master Direction – Know Your Customer (KYC) Directions, 2016 (as amended from time to time)
preamble.conclusion: This Policy lays down principles, systems, procedures and internal controls to ensure strong customer identification, risk mitigation, due diligence and monitoring.

objectives.title: 2. Objectives
objectives.intro: The objectives of this Policy are:
items: To prevent the Company from being used knowingly or unknowingly for money laundering or terrorist financing activities.
To ensure the Company understands its customers, their financial behavior and associated risks.
To promote ethical conduct and transparency in business relationships.
To comply with legal and regulatory requirements under RBI and PMLA framework.
To define procedures for detection and reporting of suspicious activities.

applicability.title: 3. Applicability
applicability.content: This KYC–AML Policy shall prevail over any other internal document, process, circular or instruction. This policy applies to all products and verticals of the Company, whether existing or introduced in the future.

items.definition: shall have the meaning assigned under the Aadhaar Act, 2016.
means Aadhaar authentication as defined under the Aadhaar Act, 2016.
means a person engaged in a financial transaction or activity with the Company.
means the Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002 and related Rules.
means identifying and verifying the customer and beneficial owner.
means an entity maintaining digital KYC records.
means the digital lending platform operated by Fluxusforge Private Limited.
means the director responsible for AML compliance.
means electronic customer verification as per RBI guidelines.
means passport, driving license, Aadhaar, Voter ID, etc.
means the officer responsible for AML reporting.
means video-based customer identification as per RBI norms.

principalOfficer.title: 5. Appointment of Principal Officer
principalOfficer.content: The Company shall designate a Principal Officer responsible for AML reporting and coordination with FIU-IND and RBI.

seniorManagement.title: a) Senior Management Responsibility
seniorManagement.content: Senior Management shall be responsible for AML/KYC implementation.

training.title: b) Training & Awareness
training.content: Regular AML/KYC training shall be conducted for employees.

customerAcceptance.title: 8. Customer Acceptance Policy
customerAcceptance.intro: The Customer Acceptance Policy ensures that:
items: No anonymous or fictitious accounts are opened.
Customers are accepted only after identity verification.
CDD is mandatory before any transaction.
customerAcceptance.note: Safeguards shall not inconvenience genuine customers.

customerIdentification.title: 9. Customer Identification Procedure (CIP)
customerIdentification.content: Customer identity shall be verified using reliable documents and information.
customerIdentification.note: OVD and PAN verification is mandatory.

transactionMonitoring.title: 12. Transaction Monitoring
content: Continuous monitoring of customer transactions is required.
Large or unusual transactions are closely reviewed.

fiuReporting.title: 13. Reporting to Financial Intelligence Unit-India
fiuReporting.content: The Company shall report cash and suspicious transactions to FIU-IND as per law.
fiuReporting.timeline: Reports shall be submitted by the 15th of the succeeding month.

recordManagement.title: 14. Record Management
recordManagement.content: Records shall be retained for at least 5 years after termination of relationship.

reportingObligations.title: 15. Reporting Obligations
reportingObligations.note: All reports shall be filed through the Principal Officer.

dataConfidentiality.title: 16. Data Confidentiality
dataConfidentiality.content: Customer information shall be kept confidential and used only for lawful purposes.

riskAssessment.title: 17. Risk Assessment
items: Annual ML/TF risk assessment shall be conducted.
Risk shall be documented and reviewed by the Board.
Risk Based Approach (RBA) shall be followed.

review.title: 18. Review & Amendment
review.content: This policy shall be reviewed annually or upon regulatory changes.

boardApproval.title: Board Approval
boardApproval.content: Approved by the Board of Directors of Satsai Finlease Private Limited
